description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
Release Highlight
- Layout has been improved for iPad devices
- Screen orientation changes are now smoother on iOS
- Importing books on iOS during the first launch is now more reliable
- Font size no longer changes unexpectedly in scrolled mode on iOS
- Top and bottom safe insets are now ignored when no header or footer is present
- Interactive books now load correctly on the Desktop platform
- Translation is now disabled when the primary language is undefined
- Android: the task list background color has been updated with current theme color
What's Changed
- sync: add network timeout of sync to 5 sec by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1432
- release: ready for Google Play release, closes #1001 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1433
- chore: download releases using cloudflare cdn by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1436
- chore: allow download url for installers by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1437
- fix: importing books on iOS at first launch is more reliable now by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1439
- css: fix unintended font size adjust in scrolled mode on iOS, closes #1438 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1440
- fix: smoother orientation change in iOS, closes #1434 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1441
- fix: correct spelling 'Themeing' to 'Theming' in README by @ChuwuYo in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1444
- layout: tweaks on layout for iPad by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1446
- layout: ignore system top/bottom safe insets when there is no header or footer, closes #1442 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1447
- fix: disable translation when the primary language is not defined, closes #1443 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1448
- android: dismiss the splash screen and change icon background color in task list by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1450
- fix: allow inline scripts on Tauri platforms by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1451
- release: version 0.9.60 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1452
New Contributors
- @ChuwuYo made their first contribution in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1444
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.59...v0.9.60
